use thiserror::Error;

#[derive(Error, Debug)]
pub enum AppError {
    #[error("failed to load config: {source}")]
    ConfigLoad {
        #[source]
        source: std::io::Error,
        path: String,
    },

    #[error("failed to parse response from {endpoint}")]
    ResponseParse {
        #[source]
        source: serde_json::Error,
        endpoint: String,
    },

    #[error("database query failed on table {table}")]
    DatabaseQuery {
        #[source]
        source: sqlx::Error,
        table: String,
    },

    #[error("HTTP request to {url} failed")]
    HttpRequest {
        #[source]
        source: reqwest::Error,
        url: String,
    },
}

fn load_config(path: &str) -> Result<Config, AppError> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path).map_err(|e| AppError::ConfigLoad {
        source: e,
        path: path.to_string(),
    })?;
    let config: Config = serde_json::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}

struct Config;
